features: 👼【Package Content】You will receive 2 pieces of letter banners, 1 piece printed with "BABY SHOWER", 1 piece printed with "IT'S A GIRL".
💐【Baby Shower Decorations】Suitable for your or your friend's baby shower party supplies, welcome to coming of little baby.
👶【Material and Size】Made of quality paper, durable and reusable, and each flag measures 15 x 12 cm/ 5.9 x 4.7 inches, rope length is 5m/ 16.4 ft.
👣【Where To Use】The banners can be hung on your home, above your snack, dessert or buffet table, tree, doorway or can be applied as a photo prop or backdrop to decorate your party.
💝【IT'S A GIRL】Baby Shower Letter Banner, IT'S A GIRL Bunting Banner for Gender Reveal Decoration, Party Garland Photo Booth Props Supplies Decoration.
